summary: Recent updates to the Web Speech area of Firefox have introduced the use of **MOZ_LOG_FMT**, which enhances the logging capabilities related to voice recognition and speech synthesis features. This change allows developers to better track and diagnose issues within the Web Speech API, the technology that enables interactive voice-based communication on the web. Improved logging can lead to faster problem-solving, ensuring a smoother and more reliable experience for users who rely on speech technologies for accessibility or convenience. _Overall, these updates help maintain the quality and performance of voice features, though users may not notice any immediate visible change._
